_about: Smoke-test cases for epitope-secondary-structure. Each case runs the bundled script over a search-epitope-host output bundle and checks the per-(epitope,parent) row's status, source selection, and DSSP-derived secondary-structure consensus. Validates: experimental-only structure selection (AlphaFold-only parents skipped), the UniProt->label->auth residue mapping + mkdssp 8-state parse, the per-structure aggregation, the 8->3 collapse, and the status taxonomy. Reference run = the EBV HLA-A*02:01 9-mer host_mapping set.
requires: mkdssp on PATH or via --mkdssp-path (conda install -c conda-forge dssp). Network access to data.rcsb.org / files.rcsb.org unless --offline against a warm cache.

expect.note: BARF1 23-31 sits in a beta strand / loop / strand; all 4 PDBs agree (prob 1.0).

The only covering structures are pMHC complexes (the peptide chain SIFTS-aligns to the parent at 325-333, span < 25), so they are excluded by the default --min-align-length 25 -> only_pmhc. With --min-align-length 0 this becomes status=ok with ss3_consensus=CCCCCCCCC (the extended MHC-bound conformation).
ICP27 homolog has only an AlphaFold model -> skipped and flagged (default; --use-alphafold + DSSP 4 to include).
GD1-strain LMP2 has no PDB and no AlphaFold model. (The same epitope maps to P13285 with a structure.)
BARF1 has PDBs, but the 2CH8 crystal covers 21-221; residues 3-11 (signal region) are in no deposited structure.
Variant peptide not found verbatim on the canonical P13285 sequence -> nothing to map.

expect.status_partition: ok + not_in_any_structure + no_structure + no_position + no_experimental_structure + only_pmhc + unmodeled == total rows

how_to_run: MK=$(conda run -n <env> which mkdssp); python scripts/epitope_ss.py <host_mapping_dir> --mkdssp-path "$MK" -o /tmp/ss_eval && python3 -c "import csv;rows={ (r['epitope'],r['uniprot_acc']):r for r in csv.DictReader(open('/tmp/ss_eval/epitope_ss.csv'))};print(rows[('AFLGERVTL','P03228')]['status'], rows[('AFLGERVTL','P03228')]['ss3_consensus'])"
